decision_note: NAME/LOCUS collision: lpg2391=SdbC, MavF=lpg2351. Decide: rename to SdbC (keep lpg2391) OR relocus MavF to lpg2351. DOI Huang2011 either way.
locus uncertain: PieE lpg1924(key) vs lpg1969(canonical). DOI Mousnier2014 applied; CONFIRM locus.
locus uncertain: PieF lpg1959(key) vs lpg1972(canonical). DOI Ninio2009 applied; CONFIRM locus.
TcpB/Btp1: NO VirB-translocation assay exists; T4SS-dependence debated. Salcedo2008 is best-available (DC/TIR function, not translocation). Decide keep-weak or drop.
BopC misattributed (real locus=TssG baseplate); gold set already has correct T3SS/Bsa BopC (row203). RECOMMEND DROP.
BopE misattributed (T3SS effector, not T6SS-5); gold set already has correct T3SS/Bsa BopE (row204). RECOMMEND DROP.
YPK_3548: demonstrated T6SS-4 substrate is YPK_3549=YezP (=R215). Likely DUPLICATE of R215 or wrong locus. Decide DROP or relocus->YPK_3549.
